children.heading: .—Distressed counties
children.label: 1 .—Distressed counties
children.text: The Commission shall designate as distressed counties those counties in its region that are the most severely and persistently economically distressed and underdeveloped and have high rates of poverty, unemployment, or outmigration.

children.heading: .—Transitional counties
children.label: 2 .—Transitional counties
children.text: The Commission shall designate as transitional counties those counties in its region that are economically distressed and underdeveloped or have recently suffered high rates of poverty, unemployment, or outmigration.

children.heading: .—Attainment counties
children.label: 3 .—Attainment counties
children.text: The Commission shall designate as attainment counties, those counties in its region that are not designated as distressed or transitional counties under this subsection.

children.heading: .—Isolated areas of distress
children.label: 4 .—Isolated areas of distress
children.text: The Commission shall designate as isolated areas of distress, areas located in counties designated as attainment counties under paragraph (3) that have high rates of poverty, unemployment, or outmigration.

children.heading: .—Allocation
children.label: b .—Allocation
children.text: A Commission shall allocate at least 50 percent of the appropriations made available to the Commission to carry out this subtitle for programs and projects designed to serve the needs of distressed counties and isolated areas of distress in the region.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), funds may not be provided under this subtitle for a project located in a county designated as an attainment county under subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Administrative expenses of local development districts
children.label: A .—Administrative expenses of local development districts
children.text: The funding prohibition under paragraph (1) shall not apply to grants to fund the administrative expenses of local development districts under section 15505.

children.label: i
children.text: a multicounty project that includes participation by an attainment county; and

children.label: ii
children.text: any other type of project, if a Commission determines that the project could bring significant benefits to areas of the region outside an attainment county.

children.label: A
children.text: a county described in paragraph (2) or (3) of section 15735; or

children.label: B
children.text: the Southern New England Regional Commission.

children.label: A
children.text: by the most recent Federal data available; or

children.label: B
children.text: if no recent Federal data are available, by the most recent data available through the government of the State in which the isolated area of distress is located.
